reviews.comment:
Una pena que un lugar con un resto (al lado) con productos regionales muy buenos, tenga un baño en la YPF que sea vomitivo. Cómo le permite YPF tener algo así? Penoso. Ojalá (al menos) limpien esos baños....

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that a place with a restaurant (next door) serving excellent regional products has such a disgusting bathroom at the YPF station. How can YPF allow something like that? It's appalling. I hope they (at least) clean those bathrooms...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoc0tfRXN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos alli por el uso de las instalaciones que estan limpias y la atención es buena.
El cafe te puede llegar tibio y el helado como piedra!

(Translated by Google)
We always stop there because the facilities are clean and the service is good.
The coffee can be lukewarm and the ice cream rock hard!

reviews.comment:
Muy buen parador rutero. Espacio amplio y comodo para comer. Buena carta. Precios logicos. Linda arboleda con mesas. Recomiendo el sandwich de crudo y queso con manteca en pan frances

(Translated by Google)
A very good roadside stop. Spacious and comfortable for eating. Good menu. Reasonable prices. Lovely grove with tables. I recommend the ham and cheese sandwich with butter on French bread.
